name: Lapland Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks for 4 to 5 minutes or until thick and lemon-colored.
2. Add sugar, flour, milk, butter, and salt. Beat for 2 to 3 minutes.
3. Gently fold in the beaten egg whites.
4. Spoon batter into 12 well-greased muffin pans, filling each about 2/3 full.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30 minutes.
6. Serve with butter and jam or jelly if desired.
